title: TreeCapitator999
description: The TreeCapitator999 plugin is designed for Minecraft servers, enhancing the tree-cutting experience by allowing players to harvest entire trees with a single action.
body:
The TreeCapitation999 plugin is designed for Minecraft servers, enhancing the tree-cutting experience by allowing players to harvest entire trees with a single action. Key features include customizable configurations for axe requirements, automatic replanting with matching saplings, and a permission system for granular control over usage. Commands include /treecapitation reload for reloading configurations without a server restart. The plugin also optimizes performance with an efficient tree scanning algorithm and supports custom log types, making it versatile for various gameplay styles.

The TreeCapitation999 plugin is a powerful tool for Minecraft server administrators, designed to streamline the tree harvesting process and enhance gameplay. This plugin allows players to cut down entire trees in one swift action, significantly improving efficiency and reducing the time spent on resource gathering. Among its standout features is the customizable configuration that lets server owners dictate whether players need an axe to use the plugin, with options to enable or disable this requirement based on gameplay preferences. Additionally, the plugin introduces an innovative auto-replant feature, which automatically plants saplings that match the species of the tree cut down, promoting sustainability within the game.

The permission system integrated into TreeCapitation999 provides fine-grained control over who can use the plugin's features, allowing server operators to set permissions such as treecapitation.use for general access, treecapitation.bypass.cooldown for those who should not face cooldowns, and treecapitation.instant for immediate tree harvesting without delays. The command /treecapitation reload is also included, enabling administrators to refresh the plugin's configuration without needing to restart the server, thus ensuring a seamless experience for players.

Performance-wise, TreeCapitation999 is optimized with a sophisticated tree scanning algorithm that minimizes lag during large operations, making it suitable for servers with high player counts or extensive tree populations. The plugin also supports custom log types, allowing for greater flexibility and compatibility with various mods and gameplay styles. Overall, TreeCapitation999 is an essential addition for any Minecraft server looking to enhance the tree harvesting experience while maintaining control and performance.
